project_name: MySQL to BigQuery Data Ingestion Pipeline

columns.name: employee_id
columns.description: Unique employee identifier. Sourced from MySQL PRI key EMPLOYEE_ID decimal(10,0). Uniqueness enforced post-load per acceptance criteria.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Employee first name. Source max length 50 characters.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Employee last name. Source max length 50 characters.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Employee email address. Source max length 100 characters. NOT NULL in source.

columns.name: phone_number
columns.description: Employee phone number. Nullable in source. Source max length 20 characters.

columns.name: hire_date
columns.description: Date the employee was hired. Partition column with MONTH granularity. Supports hire-cohort analytics filtering.

columns.name: job_id
columns.description: Job role identifier. Cluster column (position 2). Source max length 20 characters.

columns.name: salary
columns.description: Employee salary with up to 8 digits and 2 decimal places of precision.

columns.name: commission_pct
columns.description: Commission percentage with up to 4 digits and 2 decimal places. Nullable in source.

columns.name: manager_id
columns.description: Self-referential FK to employee_id representing the direct manager. NULL for top-level employees.

columns.name: department_id
columns.description: Department identifier. Cluster column (position 1). Nullable in source.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Employee status (e.g. ACTIVE, INACTIVE). Cluster column (position 3). Source max length 10 characters.

columns.name: created_date
columns.description: Record creation timestamp in the source system. NOT NULL. Can serve as fallback delta key for incremental loads.

columns.name: updated_date
columns.description: Record last update timestamp in the source system. Primary delta tracking column for timestamp-based incremental loads. MAX(updated_date) used as high-water mark per load cycle.

cardinality.notes: Many employees may report to one manager. manager_id is a self-referential FK to employee_id. Top-level employees (e.g. CEO) carry NULL in manager_id.
